episodes.title: Epstein Files: “King of the World” Statue Shows Donald Trump With Jeffrey Epstein in Washington
episodes.description:
A controversial sculpture titled “King of the World” has appeared on the National Mall in Washington, D.C. depicting Donald Trump and Jeffrey Epstein recreating the famous bow scene from the film Titanic. The 12-foot statue was installed by an anonymous activist art collective as political commentary highlighting their past social connections and sparking debate about accountability, power, and public memory.

#Trump #Epstein #WashingtonDC #NationalMall #PoliticalArt #USPolitics #WorldNews #ProtestArt #BreakingNews #USNews
